condition: route uses canal/chokepoint but no live authority or carrier advisory was checked
reason: Static chokepoint records cannot confirm current closure, draft restriction, security situation, or carrier routing.

condition: assigned sailing exists but gate-in/VGM/SI cutoffs are missing
reason: Readiness cannot honestly confirm the shipment will make the sailing without carrier/terminal cutoff times.

condition: demurrage/detention risk assessed without carrier/country tariff or free-time terms
reason: Free-time concept is verified, but exact charge exposure is carrier/country/terminal specific.

condition: service frequency is unknown and system assumes weekly service
reason: Weekly service-cycle delay is a planning heuristic, not a live schedule result.

condition: security-risk chokepoint exposure flagged without current maritime security advisory
reason: Security situations can change quickly; current routing/insurance/carrier advisories are needed.
